title: Merry-Go-Round
writer: Zoltán Fábri, László Nádasy, Imre Sarkadi
actors: Mari Törocsik, Imre Soós, Ádám Szirtes
plot: In a rural scenery in the throes of difficult changes lives a humble but promising young farmer girl called Mari Pataki. Her father forbids her from seeing the man she loves. The father, above all preoccupied by work on the fields...
